sentence_reviews.text: Structured-decoding runtimes compile grammars or schemas into efficient token filters integrated with a model server’s decoding loop.

sentence_reviews.text: They make reliable structured generation practical at serving scale instead of relying only on slow application-side retries.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Structured-output survey supports reliability motivation; DDIA supports serving-scale concerns, but the retry comparison is not directly sourced.
